props.name: active
props.description: When true, shows a one-shot fullscreen burst from the center of the viewport

atoms.name: Progress
atoms.description:
Determinate progress bar (Kobalte Progress, shadcn-solid-style).
`value` is 0–100 when `indeterminate` is false.

props.name: listAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the step list.

props.name: activeStep
props.description: 1-based index of the active step; omit for a static, equal-weight list.
